groupings.title: UnifAPI
groupings.description: Skills for UnifAPI MCP and public-data workflows.

groupings.title: GTM
groupings.description: Clay-style public GTM workflows for account research, lead discovery, enrichment, tables, competitors, and market maps.

groupings.title: Growth
groupings.description: Okara-style channel-agent outputs for social listening, content, launches, demand, and community opportunities.

groupings.title: Agent-Native Web & SEO
groupings.description: Web, SEO, news, page-change, marketplace, and ecommerce workflows that use host-agent search, fetch, shell, and code execution.

groupings.title: Creator Marketing
groupings.description: Creator discovery, campaign analysis, comment mining, and platform-specific KOL workflows.

groupings.title: Web3
groupings.description: Public social monitoring for crypto narratives, token communities, launches, and web3 KOL watchlists.

groupings.title: API Backfill
groupings.description: High-demand Clay/Okara-style workflow surfaces that still need product APIs, private connectors, persistence, write actions, or source-specific data.
